Client tracker preview for Eagle Creek Little League

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Eagle Creek Little League: A season tracker for ECLL's baseball and softball ages 4–16, built around registration, division placement, medical release, and volunteer signup.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Spring Registration is NOW OPEN!, baseball and softball program for boys and girls ages 4 through 16 on Indianapolis' northwest side, Use the T-MOBILE CALL UP GRANT FOR REGISTRATION ASSISTANCE, The president, board of directors and all managers, coaches, umpires, groundskeepers, concession stand workers, etc., are unpaid volunteers

Season ops snapshot Registration + roster board Family record (Mercer family) Registration + Volunteer view Season calendar + evaluation window Season closeout + re-enrollment Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One board for registrations, division placement, and medical-release PDF status — no more jumping between BlueSombrero, email, and your Allstate inbox.
  • Season calendar covers T-ball through Senior League (ages 4–16) in one view with per-division fee and roster tracking.
  • Parent-volunteer and coach-recruitment signups live next to the roster so unpaid volunteer coordination stops leaking into texts.

1. Season ops snapshot

Season ops snapshot

Registrations received, division placements pending, medical release PDFs in/out, volunteer coaches confirmed — Spring 2026 at a glance.

2. Registration + roster board

Registration + roster board

Every family moves from New Registration → Division Placed → Medical Release Pending → Roster Confirmed → Uniform Distributed.

3. Family record (Mercer family)

Family record (Mercer family)

Every player card holds registration PDF status, medical release PDF status, fee/scholarship status, team assignment, uniform size/number, and parent volunteer role.

Open this view

4. Registration + Volunteer view

Registration + Volunteer view

One panel to see whether the ECLL Registration Form and Medical Release Form are in, fees are paid (including T-Mobile Call Up Grant), and who has volunteered.

Season calendar + evaluation window

From 'Spring Registration is NOW OPEN' through evaluations, division placement, uniform distribution, and Opening Day at Northwestway Park.

6. Season closeout + re-enrollment

Season closeout + re-enrollment

Loaner-uniform returns, end-of-season party coordination, Fall Ball outreach, grant renewals — the closeout view that keeps families rolling into next season.

7. Setup map

Setup map

Six steps: duplicate workspace, import BlueSombrero CSV, upload both PDF templates, tag the 11 divisions, wire in your contact email, share read-only with coaches.
